text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching this UmaTuber's<n>twenty-four
hour livestream since last<n>night now... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's fallen asleep... I<n>could look at
her sleeping face<n>forever. She's a real-life an...gel.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No! Must stay awake! Mustn't miss...<n>this
pre...cious scene...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After staying up all night watching<n>UmaTube,
Agnes Digital is in a<n>constant battle against falling
asleep.
